surface_verification.justification: Security-scanner config-generation change (oss_backend._write_gitleaks_allowlist). No startable user surface; behavior verified by the oss_backend gitleaks unit suite + a tomllib validity probe.

behaviors.behavior: Generated gitleaks config allowlists cafebabe:deadbeef (regex, regexTarget=match) + stopwords
useDefault stays true so every built-in secret rule remains live (no over-suppression)
behaviors.evidence: same test asserts 'useDefault = true' in the generated config; PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Generated config is still valid TOML and carries paths + regexes + stopwords together
Existing path-exclude allowlist (node_modules/tests/...) is unchanged (no regression)
Monorepo's live GitHub Actions gitleaks scan stays green with the placeholder allowlisted
behaviors.reason: Needs the real gitleaks binary on a GH Actions runner; the smoke tests skip without it. Covered by the PR's Shipwright Security Scan check.
